name: Quadient AR (YayPay)
description: Quadient AR — Credit-to-cash platform (formerly YayPay) with predictive analytics for mid-market and enterprise

seo.title: Quadient AR (YayPay) — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Quadient AR (YayPay): Quadient AR — Credit-to-cash platform (formerly YayPay) with predictive analytics for mid-market and enterprise

when_to_use: Predictive collections prioritization for enterprise AR teams
Automating dunning workflows from credit-to-cash cycle
Cash flow forecasting and payment prediction for mid-market

pros: Integrates with major ERPs (NetSuite, Sage, D365)
cons: UI legacy remnants from YayPay era
Not ideal for very small finance teams
review.verdict: Capable credit-to-cash platform for mid-market — strong analytics, but weigh price vs newer AR tools.
review.best_for: Mid-market B2B finance teams that want analytics-driven collections on top of their ERP.
review.not_for: Small businesses needing simple, inexpensive invoicing and dunning.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
